name: rad-supabase
description: Static pre-deploy audit for Supabase migration SQL — runs before deploy, no live database needed. Four pure-stdlib Python validators: `audit-rls.py` (mirrors Splinter lint codes 0002 auth_users_exposed, 0003 auth_rls_initplan, 0008 rls_enabled_no_policy, 0011 function_search_path_mutable, 0013 rls_disabled_in_public, 0015 rls_references_user_metadata; plus structural checks for `using(true)` with no `with check` and `FOR ALL` policies), `check-secret-leaks.py`, `audit-edge-functions.py`, and `audit-functions-permissions.py` (Postgres function GRANT/REVOKE patterns — flags `GRANT ALL TO PUBLIC`, SECURITY DEFINER functions without REVOKE FROM PUBLIC, SECURITY DEFINER without SET search_path, public-schema functions with no explicit grants). Knowledge skills cover migrations, edge functions, auth, storage, realtime, branching, security, and troubleshooting; these overlap with the official Supabase plugin — pair the two for full coverage. Compatible with Supabase CLI v2.95+ and Supabase MCP server v0.7+.
